content:
# Session 16 (iter-016) ‚ÄĒ Review Summary

## Metadata
- Lanes: 2 provers (opus) ‚ÄĒ FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean`, SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean`.
- Sorry (real code): FBC **5‚Üí4**, SNAP **7‚Üí6**. Both lanes closed exactly 1. Net **‚ąí2**.
- Both files cold-build GREEN (FBC 8318 jobs, SNAP 2441 jobs), no kernel timeout; sync_leanok added 2 `\leanok`, 0 removed (sha 1ac016d). 0 new axioms. blueprint-doctor: 0 findings.
- **Second consecutive net-elimination iter** (iter-014 hK_rhs, iter-015 net-0 but pivot, iter-016 closed 1 on BOTH). The two pre-committed correctives (FBC bridge-close, SNAP instance-pinning) both landed as designed.

## FBC ‚ÄĒ `gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge` CLOSED (foundation now sorry-free)
- The iter-015 morphism-level breakthrough left ONE gating residual: the bridge `gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge` (L741). iter-016 closed it cold-green.
- Proof: rewrite `(pushforwardComp ‚Ä¶).inv.app N = eqToHom rfl` via `Scheme.Modules.hom_ext` + per-open `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app` (rfl-lemma) + `Hom.id_app`; then `rw [eqToHom_refl]; exact Category.comp_id _`; residual `eqToHom = eqToHom` by proof-irrelevance.
- **Dead-end map (verified):** naive `rw [eqToHom_map]` / `[Functor.map_id]` / `[moduleSpecőďFunctor.map_id]` all FAIL "pattern not found" ‚ÄĒ category-instance junction (`moduleSpecőďFunctor {R}` domain `(Spec (CommRingCat.of ‚ÜĎR)).Modules` vs the `ūĚüô` in `(Spec R).Modules`, defeq-not-syntactic). Term-mode `Category.comp_id` unifies up to defeq cheaply (identity carries no value-ModuleCat content ‚Üí no kernel bomb).
- Transitively completes `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` (L763) + foundation `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp` (L827). **FBC foundation coherence is now sorry-free.** lvbc-fbc016 verified all three axiom-clean (no `sorryAx`).
- Open FBC: crux `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` (L1447, conjugate-mate re-route queued), `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` (L1694, dead-mate do-not-touch), `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` (L1875) / `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` (L1897, downstream seeds gated on crux).

## SNAP ‚ÄĒ `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head` CLOSED (5-iter őľ-identity WALL down)
- The 5-iteration őľ-syntactic-identity wall is DEFEATED, cold-green. Plan's `snap-mu-identity` analogist had refuted the prior "hidden `Localization.fac` witness" diagnosis; the real root cause is a project-local **DUAL `MonoidalCategory` instance** (`pshModMonoidal` L1402 vs `MonoidalPresheaf X` synonym) making the two őľ object-args token-divergent.
- Fix landed: STATEMENT-level `(C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` pinning of every őľ object-arg. **Pinning was necessary but NOT sufficient** ‚ÄĒ two further decisive facts:
  1. őľ-pairs stay defeq-but-token-divergent even after pinning (divergence under pp `‚čĮ` truncation, invisible via pp.all). Cancel fires with **`erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]`** (reducible), NOT `rw` (pattern-not-found).
  2. The cancel/triangle rewrites BOMB in the full goal (motive re-typechecks surrounding őľ ‚Üí isDefEq 200k hb). Must **ISOLATE** each step in a `slice`/`have` (local motive, no őľ).
- New cold-green helper `sheafification_map_unit_comp_counitIso_hom` (L1885): `L'(ő∑_P) ‚Čę c_{L'P} = ūĚüô` via `sheafificationCounitIso` + `left_triangle_components`.
- **Secondary progress:** iter-015 interchange-MERGE WALL on the assembly `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs` (L2142) DEFEATED + committed (`slice_lhs 2 3 => erw [‚Üź Localization.Monoidal.tensor_comp]` + `simp only [Category.comp_id]`, two green steps). Remaining = mechanical recipe tail (re-split ‚Üí `associator_naturality` ‚Üí `associator_hom_app` ‚Üí őľ-cancel ‚Üí `rw [tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head]`); each tail step needs the same slice/have isolation. Assembly is one lemma from closing.
- Untouched cascade: `tensorPowAdd_rightUnit/braiding/assoc` (L2809/2831/2844/2849), `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (L2909) ‚ÄĒ directive deferred to next iter.

## Subagent findings (reports in `logs/iter-016/`)
- **lvbc-snap016** (0 must-fix, 2 note): `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head` genuinely sorry-free (verify: no `sorryAx`); prose faithful. Assembly L2142 still sorry ‚ÄĒ chapter does NOT over-claim, `% NOTE` caveat intact. Notes: stale "walled" sub-clause in the `% NOTE` (FIXED below); coverage-debt helper.
- **lvbc-fbc016** (0 must-fix, 1 major): foundation trio sorry-free + axiom-clean, prose faithful, comp3 `\uses` correctly removed from `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp`. **Major: stale `% NOTE` at chapter L936‚Äď945** calling the closed bridge "still-`sorry`" and "needs its own blueprint block" ‚ÄĒ both false (FIXED below). Minor: comp3 edge still on `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp` (not literally invoked). All open sorries honestly flagged, no false `\leanok`.
- **lean-auditor iter016** (13 must-fix / 14 major / 1 minor): the 13 "must-fix" = the 10 tracked frontier sorries (project work, NOT iter-016 defects ‚ÄĒ same downgrade as iter-014/015) + 3 docstring "excuse-comments." The "excuse-comments" (`base_change_mate_section_identity` / `pushforward_base_change_mate_cancelBaseChange` "transitively sorry-backed" docstrings + `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` "deferred" comment) are HONEST disclosure of sorry-backing, not "lying" ‚ÄĒ auditor has no strategy context; downgraded to hygiene. Genuine debt = accumulated stale scaffolding (see recommendations): parent-project iter-NNN labels (234/236/240/063/066/053/078), misscoped `maxHeartbeats` on the compile-dead mate region (standing, defer to mate-excision), empty Seam section headers, 59-line superseded commented-out block (SNAP L2280‚Äď2338), stale cross-ref (FBC L1688 cites non-existent L1999), `import Mathlib`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` proof `% NOTE`: rewrote stale tail (claimed bridge "still-`sorry`" + "needs its own blueprint block") ‚Üí iter-016 UPDATE recording the bridge CLOSED (cold-green, has its own `\leanok` block `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge`) and `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` + `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp` now sorry-free. (lvbc-fbc016 major.)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` proof `% NOTE`: refreshed stale sub-clause calling the head reduction "walled" ‚Üí iter-016 UPDATE recording `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head` CLOSED + the real root cause (dual MonoidalCategory instance, statement-pinning + isolated `erw`) + the merge wall defeated; caveat that the assembly half remains sorry (one tail from closing) preserved. (lvbc-snap016 note.)
- No `\leanok` override (sync correct: 2 added on the closed helpers/bridge; assembly + cascade proof blocks correctly unmarked ‚ÄĒ verified firsthand). No `\mathlibok`, no `\lean{}` rename, no stale `\notready`.

## Notes (LOW)
- `import Mathlib` blanket import in FlatBaseChange.lean (SectionGradedRing uses specific imports) ‚ÄĒ compile-time, low priority.
